features: TRAVEL ESSENTIAL - The Swirl Travel Wash is the perfect companion for travellers seeking convenience and cleanliness on the go. Designed for ultimate portability and efficiency, this 100ml travel wash is ideal for handwashing clothes in both warm and cold water, making it a must-have for any journey.

COMPACT AND CONVENIENT - The 100ml size is perfect for travel, easily fitting into luggage, backpacks, or carry on bags without taking up valuable space. It complies with airline liquid restrictions, ensuring hassle free airport security checks. With the capability to provide up to 20 washes, this concentrated formula allows you to maintain fresh and clean clothes throughout your trip without the need for bulky laundry detergents.

VERSATILE CLEANING - Formulated to work effectively in both warm and cold water, it easily removes dirt, sweat, and odors, ensuring your clothes stay fresh and hygienic no matter where you are. The mild yet powerful formulation is safe for delicate fabrics, including wool and silk, making it suitable for washing a wide range of garments.

EASY TO USE - Simply add a small amount (1-2 teaspoons) to water, lather, and rinse. It quickly dissolves and rinses out, leaving no residue or heavy fragrance, ensuring your clothes feel clean and comfortable. By allowing you to wash and reuse your clothing, it promotes sustainable travel habits, reducing the need for excessive packing or disposable items.

Ingredients Anionic surfactants, Non iron surfactant, Potassium sorbate, parfum.
